content: These criteria scored 95%+ on first attempt and don't discriminate quality — consider making them harder or removing: journal_entry_testing_methodology_precision, saas_revenue_recognition_manipulation_vectors, data_source_authentication_deficiencies, internal_control_deficiency_materiality_assessment, saas_metrics_manipulation_correlation, statistical_sampling_methodology_errors, professional_skepticism_documentation_specific, comparative_period_variance_quantification, regulatory_reporting_impact_cascade_analysis, forensic_interview_planning_framework
task: Write a forensic accounting memo analyzing suspected revenue manipulation at a mid-market SaaS company. Include journal entry analysis, Benfords Law testing, timeline reconstruction, and quantified financial impact.
